message:
chore: track .beads/ directory for project issue/metadata state

Remove .beads/ from .gitignore so that beads config, issues, and metadata
are version-controlled as part of the project's task-tracking state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -27,7 +27,6 @@ franken_networkx_illustration.png
 
 # Local agent/task metadata
 .bv/
-.beads/
 
 # Ephemeral agent/runtime artifacts
 storage.sqlite3
